questions.question: Describe the difference between First-Come-First-Served (FCFS) and Shortest Job First (SJF) scheduling algorithms. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Explain the time complexity and advantages of each algorithm

questions.question: What is the purpose of a context switch in the context of CPU scheduling? Explain how it affects the system's performance.
questions.hint: Consider the overhead of context switching in multi-threaded systems

questions.question: A system is using a Round Robin (RR) scheduling algorithm with a time quantum of 10 milliseconds. If five processes are waiting to be executed, how many times will the scheduler switch between the processes and which process will be executed first?
questions.hint: Consider the total execution time of each process and the number of processes waiting to be executed
